myHome.modalUploadVideoNote: (Upload a video that is 10-60 seconds long, under 200MB, and shows your face clearly.)
myHome.modalDescriptionVideo: Share the story behind your video.
myHome.modalDescriptionPost: What would you like to share?
myHome.modalNote1: We don't allow content that is sexually explicit, hateful, dangerous, or involves anyone under 18.
myHome.modalNote2: Don't share private contact info inside your post.
myHome.modalNote3: Please don't post material that carries watermarks from other platforms — we want your originals.
myHome.modalNote4: Posts go through a quick review (usually within 24 hours) before they appear in feeds.

profile.remindUpload: Remind {name} to upload more photos and videos
profile.notFoundDescription: We could not find a profile for @{username}. The member may have changed their username or the profile may no longer be active.
profile.notFoundTipsBody: Go back to discover other members, browse success stories, or return home and continue exploring.
profile.notFoundHelpBody: If you think this is an error, please try another username or refresh the page.

myList.empty: No users in this category yet.

blog.title: MEMBER'S BLOG'S
blog.description: Blogs let you express your thoughts, personal experiences, and interests while connecting with other members. They act as a natural conversation starter, making it easier to engage and build meaningful connections with others.
blog.modalFieldTitlePlaceholder: Write an eye-catching title for your blog post.
blog.modalGuidelinesTitle: To keep our community respectful and safe, please avoid the following in your blog posts:
blog.modalGuideline1: Offensive, profane, vulgar, abusive, or pornographic content.
blog.modalGuideline3: Personal contact details such as email, phone numbers, or addresses.
blog.modalGuideline4: HTML code or content copied directly from other websites.

diseaseQa.title: Disease Q&A
diseaseQa.heroTitle: Ask health questions safely, anonymously, and without judgment.
diseaseQa.heroDescription: A supportive space where members can ask questions, share experiences, and get thoughtful feedback from the community.
diseaseQa.disclaimer: Disclaimer: The opinions expressed by members are entirely their own and do not necessarily reflect the views of VIVA LEVE itself. All information provided is for reference only. For specific details regarding medical conditions and medications, please consult with a qualified healthcare professional.
diseaseQa.sectionBody: Privacy is protected, conversations are moderated, and our community is here with compassion and clarity.
diseaseQa.createPostDescription: Share what you are experiencing. You can post anonymously if you prefer.
diseaseQa.postAnonymousHelp: Your name will not be shown on the feed.
diseaseQa.sidebarBody: Use supportive language, avoid diagnosing others, and remember that this space does not replace medical advice.
diseaseQa.reportDetailsPlaceholder: Your report is confidential. Please provide more details to help our review.
diseaseQa.reportEvidenceNote: (Upload up to 4 photos or screenshots to help us better understand the issue.)

successStories.title: Success Stories
successStories.introTitle: Celebrate the real journeys that started here.
successStories.introDescription: Browse member milestones, like the stories you love, leave a comment, report unsafe content, and open any profile to see the person behind the post.
successStories.shareDialogDescription: A polished creator flow for members to draft and publish a meaningful relationship milestone.
successStories.guideline1: Add photos or videos that support the story.

privacy.showAll: Show my profile to all members
privacy.showLiked: Show only to members I like
privacy.showLikedStandard: Show to members I like or members beyond the Standard
privacy.hideAll: Hide me from all members (including my photos)
privacy.showSameStd: Show to members with the same STD
privacy.hideOnline: Hide my online status from my profile

notifications.title: In-App Notifications
notifications.viewedDesc: Be notified when a member views your profile.
notifications.likesDesc: Be notified when a member likes you.
notifications.messagesDesc: Be notified when a member sends you a new message.

account.name: Name
account.deactivateDesc: Temporarily pause or permanently delete your presence.
account.deleteConfirmDesc: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete your dating profile, matches, assets, and chat context histories.

autoReply.title: Auto-reply when I'm offline
autoReply.desc: When enabled, one auto-reply will be sent to new messages while you're offline.

resetPasses.title: Reset Flame Passes
resetPasses.desc: When you pass on profiles in FLAME, you won't see these members again until you run out of other options. You may reset your previous passes at any time.

auth.layoutPanelSubtitle: Experience standard split-screen platform components safely and rapidly.
auth.loginSubtitle: Enter your structural credentials to open your session.
auth.registerSubtitle: Join an authentic, safe match making space.
auth.codeSentTo: Enter the verification pin token code sent to your destination address.
auth.forgotPasswordSubtitle: Provide your registration email destination address below.
auth.resetPasswordSubtitle: Configure your modern security key configurations below.

validation.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.nameMin: Full legal name must contain at least 2 characters.
validation.passwordMin: Security passkey must be at least 8 characters long.
validation.passwordUppercase: Passkey requires at least one uppercase letter [A-Z].
validation.passwordNumber: Passkey requires at least one numerical identifier [0-9].
validation.passwordMismatch: The confirmation passkey does not match your assigned password.
validation.acceptTerms: You must check and authorize the core terms of use to register.
